---
title: "Modern statistics for modern biology"
format: html
---

## Lectures

-   [Course overview](lectures/course_overview)
-   [Introduction to R](lectures/intro_to_R)
-   [Statistical inference: logical reasoning](lectures/logical_reasoning)
-   [Statistical inference: from propositional logic to probability theory](lectures/from_propositional_logic_to_probability_theory)
-   [Statistical inference: statistical models](lectures/statistical_models)
-   [Statistical inference: Bayesian inference workflow](lectures/bayesian_inference_workflow)
-   [Statistical inference: linear models](lectures/linear_models)

## Notes
